title: taraxacum celticum
intro: Taraxacum celticum, also known as western dandelion, is a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion genus and is native to western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's roots and leaves are rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron, providing various health benefits, such as supporting liver and kidney function, reducing blood pressure, and acting as a natural diuretic. Taraxacum celticum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in salads and as a food ingredient.
